arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Chelsea side that drew 4-4 with Aston Villa in a Boxing Day thriller?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bologna: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa are aiming to continue their hugely impressive start to the season when they host Italian side Bologna in the Champions League on Tuesday night. Bologna upset the odds to qualify for the Champions League but have endured a tough start to the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Champions League debut, Mings prediction & 'amazing' Villa Park - Matty Cash's Bologna press conference - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: "The game nowadays is so tactical that when you have a manager like Emery who knows it inside out it helps and you can see how well drilled we are tactically over two years and that’s why we’ve had good results against very tough opponents. We’re meeting after this press conference and we will probably be there for an hour and a half, but if you want to play in big games to be successful you have to take it all in.

arts.ttl: Bologna manager Italiano calls for more cunning ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Bologna manager Vincenzo Italiano has emphasized the need for his team to show more guile and intensity as they prepare to face Aston Villa in the Champions League. The post Bologna manager Italiano calls for more cunning ahead of Aston Villa clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes Aston Villa ambitions clear: "I don't want to waste my time"
arts.sum: After wins against Young Boys and Bayern Munich, Aston Villa can put one foot in the Champions League knockout stages by beating Bologna - but Unai Emery doesn't want to stop there

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Bologna injury, suspension list, predicted XI
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bologna.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star opens up on the Tyrone Mings effect and yet another Unai Emery meeting
arts.sum: Matty Cash has revealed Tyrone Mings has been impressing in training ahead of his return to action for Aston Villa. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Working in Italy, Iling-Junior exit and Liverpool warning - Unai Emery’s Bologna press conference - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: After the win at Fulham, tomorrow is the new challenge to try to keep the same mentality, performance and preparation for the match. We started well and we played before the break very well in the Champions League and won two games but to get the balance is the most important.
